description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated, crowned figure with a long beard, possibly representing a king or a religious figure. The figure is robed, with detailed folds in the garment, and holds an object across its lap, which could be a sword or staff. The facial features are finely carved, with a solemn expression and prominent cheekbones. The crown is adorned with small points, and the hands are positioned symmetrically on the object in the lap. The back and sides of the sculpture are less detailed, with rougher texture and less defined features. The material appears to be stone or ivory, giving the sculpture a pale, slightly mottled appearance.
description: A seated, crowned figure with a long beard, robed and holding an object across its lap, carved in pale stone or ivory. The front is highly detailed, while the sides and back are rougher.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, crown, and hands holding an object across the lap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and rough, less detailed surface along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal detail, showing the back of the robe and crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a rough, narrow profile and little detail.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and isolated.
